failures.description: The Executor misinterpreted the ProductCatalogSearch result by ignoring or contradicting the returned count of 2 matching items with prices above the threshold.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked which available RGB mechanical keyboards cost more than $233.90. The agent correctly planned and called ProductCatalogSearch, and the tool returned two matching items priced 272.33 and 237.48. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as 'No items match,' which directly contradicts the relevant tool output. This error was not resolved later; the Evaluator reinforced the same wrong interpretation.
